---
title: "Experiment With Feature Weights"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("notebooks/00_source_project.R")
prepared_path <- "data/prepared/kjv_section_docs.csv"
if(file.exists(prepared_path)){
  section_docs <- readr::read_csv(prepared_path, show_col_types = FALSE)
} else {
  kjv <- readr::read_csv("data/raw/kjv.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)
  section_docs <- prepare_kjv_sections(kjv)
}
```

## 1. Baseline configuration

```{r baseline}
baseline_config <- default_config(
  include = c("char", "word", "stem", "function_words", "punctuation", "sentence", "lexical")
)

baseline <- run_stylometry_ensemble(section_docs, baseline_config)
baseline$weights_used
```

## 2. Style-heavy configuration

```{r style-heavy}
style_config <- new_stylometry_config(
  include = c("char", "function_words", "punctuation", "sentence", "lexical"),
  weights = c(
    char = 0.35,
    function_words = 0.35,
    punctuation = 0.10,
    sentence = 0.10,
    lexical = 0.10
  )
)

style_result <- run_stylometry_ensemble(section_docs, style_config)
style_result$weights_used
round(style_result$overall_similarity, 3)
```

## 3. Character-only configuration

```{r char-only}
char_config <- new_stylometry_config(
  include = c("char"),
  weights = c(char = 1)
)

char_result <- run_stylometry_ensemble(section_docs, char_config)
round(char_result$overall_similarity, 3)
```

## 4. Compare nearest neighbors

```{r compare-nn}
dplyr::bind_rows(
  baseline$nearest_neighbors %>% dplyr::mutate(model = "baseline"),
  style_result$nearest_neighbors %>% dplyr::mutate(model = "style_heavy"),
  char_result$nearest_neighbors %>% dplyr::mutate(model = "char_only")
) %>%
  dplyr::select(model, doc_id, rank, neighbor_doc_id, similarity)
```
